d: Rahun Main Tere Rubaru is a suspense thriller that follows a vlogger whose peaceful getaway turns into a nightmare when he is falsely implicated in a murder and his girlfriend is kidnapped. As he fights to clear his name and rescue her, he is drawn into a dangerous web of deception, betrayal, and survival. Even after the final showdown, the price of survival leaves a lasting impact, blurring the line between who he was and who he has become.
